name: reschedule_appointment
description: Move an existing booked appointment to a new live-checked slot. Re-search availability first if the caller changed preferences. Copy practitioner_id, branch_id, appointment_type_id, and start_time UNCHANGED from ONE slot object in the most recent search_availability result -- start_time is UTC and looks nothing like the spoken local time (start_time_display); never reconstruct, retime, or guess it. Mention a cancellation fee ONLY when the tool response says cancellation_fee.applicable is true.

caller_full_name.description: Caller full name matching the patient on the appointment.

practitioner_id.description: Required. Copy unchanged from practitioner_id in the same selected search_availability slot.

practitioner_name.description: Doctor name only when practitioner_id is unavailable.

branch_id.description: Required. Copy unchanged from branch_id in the same selected search_availability slot.

branch_name.description: Branch name only when branch_id is unavailable.

appointment_type_id.description: Required. Copy unchanged from appointment_type_id in the same selected search_availability slot.

appointment_type_name.description: Appointment type name only when appointment_type_id is unavailable.

start_time.description: Required. Copy the complete ISO-8601 UTC timestamp unchanged from start_time in the same selected search_availability slot. This is NOT the same string as start_time_display -- never derive it from the local time you spoke aloud.
